title: SC Eternal
description: This mod is and will be about The Sculk Biome. Have fun!
body:
_Not working on it currently_

This mod adds a new biome, ore, blocks and soon much much more! It's about "The Eternal", the sculk wich will never be destroyed. This mods adds currently and mainly The Eternal's biome, infected ore, a new structure and a new weapon. More soon!
